Your life is tied to one country...and it doesn't have to be.

International structures for entrepreneurs, investors, and mobile families.

Get Started
CPA-Led Coordination
Multi-Jurisdictional Network
Compliance-First Approach

What We Do

We build your international life.You live it.

Capital & Access

Tax Residency

You're paying taxes based on where you were born, not where you live or earn.

Banking & Capital Access

Your bank can freeze your account or restrict your movement with no warning.

Digital Asset Integration

Crypto profits often sit in a grey zone, making it hard to bank and harder to explain.

Structure & Protection

Ownership Structures

Holding everything in your personal name means one lawsuit could take it all.

Risk & Asset Protection

Political instability, lawsuits, or currency devaluation can wipe out progress overnight.

Succession & Estate

Without cross-border planning, your estate could face double taxation or probate.

Life & Mobility

Citizenship & Mobility

A single passport limits where you can live, work, and move freely.

Healthcare Access

Stuck with one country's system: long waits and limited options.

Education Planning

Your children's education options are limited to one country's school system.

What You Get

Strategic implementation.Everything, coordinated.

01

STRATEGIC BLUEPRINT

A custom roadmap for your international life. No generic templates—just a clear plan built for your specific situation.

02

GLOBAL BANKING

We take care of opening bank accounts abroad. We get you verified and set up in the world’s most stable countries.

03

ENTITY SETUP

We set up and coordinate your companies or trusts. We make sure everything is registered correctly and works for you.

04

RESIDENCY & CITIZENSHIP

We handle the paperwork for your new residency or citizenship. We work with local experts so you don’t have to.

05

COMPLIANCE & REPORTING

We track your global tax filings and reports. We stay on top of the rules so your structure stays legal and safe.

06

ONGOING SUPPORT

As laws and your life change, we update your structure. We make sure your international setup stays efficient and secure.

Start Your Blueprint

Start Your Blueprint

Built for globally mobile founders and families.

Who This Is For

This is for you if...

01

Global Income

You earn income in more than one country and face redundant tax exposure.

02

Second Passports

You seek a second passport or residency to expand your mobility and secure your future.

03

Digital Assets

You hold significant crypto and need a compliant, structural bridge to traditional finance.

04

Relocating

You’re planning a strategic move abroad and need to cleanly transition your life.

05

Asset Protection

You want to insulate your wealth across trusted jurisdictions from localized risks.

06

Family Planning

You need cross-border architecture for your family’s education, healthcare, and succession.

How It Works

Map. Build. Maintain.

01

Map

Strategic assessment.

A deep-dive valuation of your global footprint. We identify risks and explore opportunities before drafting a single document.

02

Build

Seamless execution.

We execute your custom blueprint. From offshore banking and entities to residencies and tax filings, we handle the entire implementation.

03

Maintain

Ongoing optimization.

As laws and your life evolve, we ensure your structure remains compliant and optimized. One partner for the long-term management of your international life.

The Architect

Martin Popiel, CPA

Chartered Professional Accountant

Martin lives the international life he builds for others. With multiple citizenships, residencies and businesses across three continents, he understands the complexity of a global footprint. One firm for banking. Another for residency. Another for tax. None of them talking to each other.

He founded Blueprint to solve this problem, providing a single team to coordinate your entire international structure under one roof.

CPA Ontario3 Languages40+ CountriesLinkedIn

FAQ

Common Questions

Is this legal?

Yes, fully. Every structure we coordinate is built on established legal frameworks, implemented by licensed professionals in each jurisdiction. We work with tax attorneys, immigration lawyers, and banking compliance officers to ensure everything is transparent and above board.

How long does this take?

It depends on your situation. Some structures can be in place within 6 months. More complex, multi-jurisdiction roadmaps can take a year or longer. We scope the timeline during your initial assessment.

How much does it cost?

It depends on the scope. A single residency application is different from a full multi-jurisdiction structure. We provide a clear quote after the initial assessment: no hidden fees, no hourly billing surprises.

I already have an accountant and lawyer. Do I still need this?

Probably. Your local accountant and lawyer are great for domestic matters. But cross-border structuring requires coordination across multiple jurisdictions: that’s the gap Blueprint fills. We work alongside your existing team, not against them.

What if my situation changes after we build the structure?

That’s what the Maintain phase is for. Laws change, life changes. We handle renewals, annual filings, and structural adjustments so everything stays current and compliant.

Blueprint Global

One firm. One plan. Your entire international structure: designed, built, and maintained under one roof.

ServicesWhat We DoHow It WorksAbout
CompanyBlogContactClient Login

Blueprint Global coordinates international structuring and project-manages the implementation process. We do not provide tax, legal, investment, or immigration advice. All advisory services are delivered by licensed professionals in their respective jurisdictions. Past outcomes do not guarantee future results. Each client's structure depends on their individual circumstances.
